text: This chart displays the top YouTube content categories by total likes, ensuring that any 'Vlogs' related categories are explicitly included, even if they don't rank in the absolute top 10. This provides a comprehensive view of highly liked content, with a specific focus on 'Vlogs' performance.

data.sql_used:
WITH Top10 AS (
    SELECT
        category AS "Category",
        SUM(likes) AS "Total Likes"
    FROM "dt_1773513164716_youtube_content_creation"
    GROUP BY category
    ORDER BY "Total Likes" DESC
    LIMIT 10
),
VlogsCategories AS (
    SELECT
        category AS "Category",
        SUM(likes) AS "Total Likes"
    FROM "dt_1773513164716_youtube_content_creation"
    WHERE category ILIKE '%vlogs%'
    GROUP BY category
)
SELECT "Category", "Total Likes" FROM Top10
UNION
SELECT "Category", "Total Likes" FROM VlogsCategories
ORDER BY "Total Likes" DESC
LIMIT 15;

text: What are the top 10 categories by total likes, ensuring 'Vlogs' is included if it's not in the top 10?

This chart displays the total likes for categories containing 'Vlogs'. If 'Vlogs' was not present in the previous top 10 chart, it indicates its total likes were lower than the tenth-ranked category. This provides a direct view of its performance.

data.sql_used: SELECT category AS "Category", SUM(likes) AS "Total Likes" FROM "dt_1773513164716_youtube_content_creation" WHERE category ILIKE '%vlogs%' GROUP BY category ORDER BY "Total Likes" DESC;
